segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a darkened stage, quickly transitioning to a vibrant 'Celebrity Family Feud' set, illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lighting and large circular backdrops. Upbeat game show music plays as an announcer declares, "It's the season premiere of your favorite summer show," introducing the "Kardashians versus the West family." The announcer then exclaims, "It's time for Celebrity Family Feud! It's the face-off we've all been waiting for!" He identifies the "Kim and Kanye West and family" team, playing for Children's Hospital Los Angeles, and states they are "taking on the Kardashians," who are also playing for the same hospital. Two teams, labeled 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN,' stand behind podiums with microphones. The WEST team includes Kanye West, a man in a black jacket, Khloé Kardashian with long blonde hair, Kourtney Kardashian with curly hair in a beige outfit, and two other men. The KARDASHIAN team features Kim Kardashian with braided hair, Kris Jenner in a black outfit with a cross necklace, Kendall Jenner in a brown blazer, and another woman in a green dress. The announcer then builds anticipation, declaring, "And now, the star of our show, Steve Harvey!" The audience erupts in loud cheers and applause as the Host, a bald man with a mustache in a sharp gray suit, energetically walks center stage, gesturing and speaking with enthusiasm. He greets the audience and teams, saying, "Hey, Chris, what's up, darling?" likely to Kris Jenner, and expresses appreciation, "Appreciate y'all. Thank you very much." The stage design, with its central circular platform and show logo, along with bright spotlights and animated lighting, enhances the lively and celebratory game show atmosphere, further amplified by the continuous audience engagement.

segments.integrated_caption: The 'Celebrity Family Feud' stage bursts to life with dynamic blue and orange lighting, showcasing circular backdrops for the 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN' teams. The Host, Steve Harvey, a bald man in a sharp gray suit, energetically welcomes everyone to the show, his voice clear and commanding, as the audience erupts in cheers and applause. He announces the families will be battling for $25,000 for charity, prompting another wave of enthusiastic applause and game show music swells. Steve then introduces 'The West Family,' leading to a massive roar from the audience. He approaches the WEST team, shaking hands with Kanye West, who is in a black zip-up jacket, and warmly engaging with Khloé Kardashian, in a black sleeveless dress. Steve humorously states, 'No introduction necessary. Yeezy,' referring to Kanye, who responds in a deep, calm voice, confirming he's 'good' and thanking Steve for the welcome. Kanye also confirms that everyone is a big fan of Family Feud. As Steve continues to interact, asking Kanye how he's been, Kanye replies, 'I've been good, you know,' and thanks Steve again for the compliment on his appearance. Steve then turns to Khloé, gesturing for an introduction, and she laughs playfully, adding to the lively atmosphere as Kourtney Kardashian, in a beige crop top, smiles and adjusts her hair in the background.

Game show music swells as the Host moves to the KARDASHIAN team, exclaiming, "Let's go meet the Kardashian family!" to a burst of audience cheers and applause. Kris lightheartedly confirms, "They keep me busy. They keep me hopping around here," and shares a friendly exchange with the Host about his wife, Marjorie, saying, "Love Marjorie. So beautiful." She expresses her excitement to be there, "Good, really good. So excited to be here." The Host then addresses the entire KARDASHIAN team, which includes Kim Kardashian, Kendall Jenner, and Kourtney Kardashian, pointing and speaking with enthusiasm, noting, "you've never seen this before, one, two, three, four, five, six people over here," referring to the expanded team. He jokes about a "family feud backstage" that "couldn't settle it," eliciting laughter from the audience. As the Host stands center stage, gesturing with emphasis, the team members listen attentively, occasionally smiling or nodding, while the dynamic stage lighting with spotlights and LED effects enhances the lively atmosphere. The segment concludes with Kris Jenner introducing, "This is my beautiful mother," as the Host prepares to introduce the "real star of the show."

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a close-up of Kim Kardashian, smiling warmly with her braided hair styled in two thick plaits, wearing a black long-sleeve top, as the host introduces "Mary Jo, who we call MJ." The camera then pans to Kanye West and Khloé Kardashian, both standing behind their podiums, clapping and smiling, while the audience erupts in cheers and applause. The scene shifts to the KARDASHIAN team, where Kris Jenner, in a black outfit with a cross necklace, and a woman with short brown hair are seen laughing and engaging with the host. The host, a bald man in a gray suit with a mustache, gestures animatedly as he speaks, leaning on the podium and interacting with the teams, explaining that "Mary Jo is playing in tandem with Kris." He humorously adds that he doesn't need to explain why she's on the show, as "she was not not gonna be on the show," eliciting laughter and applause from the audience. He expresses his admiration for Mary Jo, saying, "Oh my god, you're my favorite," and recounts how he insisted she be on TV. Kris Jenner interjects, "we all get it from somewhere," to which the host agrees. The host then asks Kris to "introduce everybody." Kris, with a clear voice, introduces "my third oldest child, Khloé Kardashian," prompting a massive cheer and applause from the audience. The host then asks Khloé, "So how you been?" Khloé, with an excited tone, replies, "Good. Yeah, I'm excited to be here. We've been fighting, you know? I'm ready for this feud, me and Kim. Kim, I got you." Wide shots of the stage reveal the full lineup under dynamic blue and orange lighting, with circular backdrops displaying team names and a central platform featuring the 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo. On the WEST team, Kanye West, Khloé Kardashian, and a man with braided hair in a black sweatshirt (NewEntity1) are visible; on the KARDASHIAN team, Kim Kardashian, Kris Jenner, and the woman with short brown hair are present, all engaged in the lively and celebratory game show atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The video segment opens with a wide shot of the 'Celebrity Family Feud' stage, illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lighting, as the Host, a bald man in a sharp gray suit, energetically engages the KARDASHIAN team. He moves along their podiums, gesturing animatedly, and announces with an energetic voice, "And then we have my fifth beautiful child, Kendall Jenner!" The crowd erupts in cheers and applause, accompanied by game show sound effects, as Kendall Jenner, visually expressive in a black blazer and layered gold necklaces, smiles broadly and waves playfully. The Host continues, praising her as "2017's highest paid model in the world!", eliciting more enthusiastic cheers and applause from the crowd. He exclaims "Yes!" twice, then humorously adds, "And somehow I'm hoping against all odds that she finds one of my sons to be..." which draws laughter from the crowd and the team, including Khloé Kardashian, who laughs with her signature braided hair, and Kris Jenner, who smiles and claps. The Host continues his joke, "Oh, he fine. No, he not, but if you could just feel that...", prompting more laughter. He then transitions, mentioning Kendall's clothing line with her sister, "Kendall and Kylie." Addressing Kendall directly, he asks, "How are you?", to which Kendall, in a clear, calm voice, replies, "I'm good." After his welcome, she adds, "Thank you. Like they've all said, we're very excited to be here," and later, "Thank you." The Host then shifts focus, asking, "Who else we got?", and introduces the next team member, "our beautiful cousin, CC Bussy," as the crowd once again cheers and applauds with accompanying game show sounds.

With dynamic spotlights and LED effects enhancing the modern stage design, the Host then announces, "Top five answers on the board, here we go," followed by a buzzer sound. Kanye West quickly buzzes in and confidently answers "Lips," which is met with a huge wave of audience applause and game show music. Kanye declares, "I'm here to win, bro. Kim Kardashian comments, "Good answer," before the Host emphatically confirms, "Lips!" as another buzzer sounds and the audience erupts in cheers and applause.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with Khloé Kardashian laughing and smiling amidst a wave of applause and cheering. Kanye West stands confidently behind his WEST team podium, smiling and clapping along. The Host, Steve Harvey, a bald man with a mustache in a gray suit, takes center stage, gesturing animatedly. He repeatedly emphasizes the word "Massive" with a deep, booming voice, drawing out the syllables, then jokes about it being "the biggest word you could come up with." He moves along the KARDASHIAN team’s podiums, placing a hand on Khloé’s, engaging the team with humor and prompting laughter from both the audience and the teams. The camera pulls back to reveal the vibrant, modern game show set, illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lighting, featuring circular backdrops for the 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN' teams, and a central platform displaying the 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo, all set against a backdrop of continued applause and laughter. The Host continues his energetic interaction, holding a show logo card. Kanye West laughs heartily, while Kim Kardashian, with braided hair, smiles down at her podium. The Host then quips to Kim, "Kim, this is well, this is gonna make my day one way or the other. I don't know. Whatever you say, I'm recording it," before posing a question: "We ask 100 women name a reason you think Steve Harvey's a good kisser." A female voice from the Kardashian team (Khloé) responds, "Um, because you're tall," to which the Host emphatically repeats, "He's tall!" The Host gestures to the large screen, which displays the category 'MASSIVE FISH LIPS' and a score of 70. A loud buzzer signals an incorrect answer, and a red 'X' appears on screen, eliciting groans from the audience. The Host reacts with mock surprise, joining the teams in laughter. The full stage is shown again, with the audience clapping and reacting. The Host continues to engage the teams with energetic pointing and speaking. Kanye West comments, "I'm not the best person for this," followed by a female voice from the Kardashian team (Kim) saying, "I should have said..." The Host then prompts, "So what, you think you could..." The scene concludes with the Host standing between the teams, holding his card, as they prepare for the next round, all under the dynamic spotlights and LED effects that maintain the lively game show atmosphere.

The Host, a bald man in a gray suit with a mustache, energetically engages with the WEST team, prompting audience laughter and applause as he jokes, "Sexy bald head." He then addresses the audience, stating, "All I got to do is find them 12 people," before posing a question to NewEntity1, identified as Jalil: "we to ask 100 women, name a reason they think Steve Harvey's a good kisser." Jalil responds, "They like your complexion. Melanin," which elicits an "ooh" and laughter from the audience. The Host humorously echoes, "Because of my complexion!" followed by a game show buzzer sound and audience groans, indicating an incorrect answer. The score updates to '82' on the board. The camera cuts to the KARDASHIAN team, where Kim Kardashian, Kris Jenner, Kendall Jenner, and a woman with short brown hair are seen smiling and clapping. The Host continues his lively interaction, placing a hand on Kim’s podium, and warns, "We got two strikes now, Ricky, we gotta be careful. Kardashians can steal," before re-asking the question. Kanye West confidently offers, "I'm gonna go with your swag." The Host enthusiastically repeats, "Swag! You better please understand. Swag. Swag. Yes!" as the audience cheers and laughs. The Host continues, "It drips off..." culminating in a wide shot of the stage with dynamic blue and orange lighting and the 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo prominently displayed, maintaining a lively atmosphere with all participants visibly enjoying the game.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the energetic Host of 'Celebrity Family Feud,' a bald man in a gray suit with a patterned tie, exclaiming "You gotta know it!" as vibrant game show music and enthusiastic audience applause fill the air. He continues with an upbeat "Oh yeah!" before announcing, "Hey folks, we got a good game now. We'll be right back, don't go away!" The stage, illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lights and circular LED backdrops displaying 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN' team names, sets a lively scene. The camera cuts between close-ups of the Host and the teams, showing Kanye West in a black zip-up jacket, smiling and clapping, and Kim Kardashian with braided hair, smiling at her podium. The Host builds anticipation, declaring "Coming up! Give me Kim, give me Khloé!" followed by a dramatic, deep-voiced "Family Feud" accompanied by a distinct whoosh sound. A confident male voice, likely Kanye, then states, "I got a feeling when this game over, it ain't gonna be over," adding playfully, "That's when you gotta talk to the man with that bald head," eliciting audience laughter. The Host returns with a booming "Welcome back, Celebrity Family Feud!" and repeats, "Give me Kim, give me Khloé!" He interacts playfully with Khloé Kardashian, who, with braided hair, laughs as he places a hand on her podium. Kourtney Kardashian, in a beige crop top, laughs heartily beside him. A playful exchange ensues with multiple female voices, including Khloé's distinct "Nope, not here, Kim" and "Not today, Kim," countered by Kim's "No, not here" and "I see how it is." The Host interjects with "We ain't doing this" and "Yes!" before stating, "This is it, ain't no ain't no ain't we ain't shaking hands," to which Khloé asserts, "It's called Family Feud." The segment culminates with the Host standing center stage, arms outstretched, as the 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo flashes on screen, emphasizing the show’s dynamic and competitive atmosphere amidst ongoing game show music and audience applause.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the vibrant 'Celebrity Family Feud' set, illuminated by dynamic blue and orange lighting, as the Host, Steve Harvey, a bald man in a gray suit and patterned tie, stands center stage. Audience laughter and sounds fill the air as he engages the WEST team. Kanye West, in a black zip-up jacket, smiles and claps beside him, and a male voice, identified as Kanye, makes humorous, somewhat deadpan comments about someone being an 'architect,' 'real smart,' and getting 'real sexy to head out to the brunch,' eliciting more audience laughter. A woman with long blonde hair in a black sleeveless dress next to Kanye laughs and raises her arms in excitement. Steve Harvey gestures animatedly, moving along the podiums and echoing Kanye's 'brunch' comment, saying, 'Right after church you got your all your stuff out at brunch... All right, Julio, brunch!' to further laughter. A game show buzzer then sounds, followed by audience groans and applause. The camera cuts to a close-up of a man with braided hair in a gray hoodie laughing heartily, then pans to show the full WEST team, including Kanye, the blonde woman, a woman with curly dark hair in a green top, and a man with braided hair in a black sweatshirt with a silver nameplate necklace, whom Steve Harvey addresses as 'Ricky,' stating, 'All right, Ricky, we got one strike.' Steve Harvey then poses the question: 'Talk to 100 women, name an occasion when you slip into something sexy instead of comfortable.' Kanye West responds, 'Uh, what about her boyfriend's birthday?' which Steve Harvey repeats with emphasis, 'Her boyfriend's birthday!' to audience applause. A 'correct answer' sound effect plays, followed by enthusiastic cheers and applause. Steve Harvey then addresses Kanye directly, 'Kanye, only one strike,' and repeats the question. Kanye responds, 'Valentine's Day, Steve,' prompting Steve Harvey to excitedly repeat, 'Valentine's Day!' as the audience cheers. Steve Harvey then corrects himself, 'Steve Harvey, I mean,' and encourages, 'Come on.' Throughout, the scoreboard is visible, displaying categories like 'DATE NIGHT' and 'BIRTHDAY' with updating scores, and Kris Jenner, in a black outfit with a cross necklace, smiles and claps on the KARDASHIAN team, while a woman with short brown hair laughs beside her, and another woman with braided hair smiles down at her podium, all reacting to the lively and humorous atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with lively game show music and applause as the Host, a bald man in a gray suit and patterned tie, energetically engages the WEST team. He leans on their podium, asking Kim Kardashian, with long silver-blonde hair in a black sleeveless top, "You don't like locking the door, Kim?" Kim responds with a soft, clear voice, "No, 'cause I feel bad they sneak in our room in the middle of the night." The Host, with a deep, engaging voice, quickly retorts, "See, that's the problem. I don't need them sneaking in the room," eliciting laughter from Kanye West, in a black zip-up jacket, and Kourtney Kardashian, in a beige crop top, as a buzzer sounds. The Host continues his humorous banter, joking about needing "therapy" for kids who sneak in, leading to more audience cheers and a dramatic buzzer sound. The camera cuts to close-ups of Kim laughing and Kris Jenner, with short dark hair and a cross necklace, smiling broadly on the KARDASHIAN team. Kendall Jenner, in a black blazer, and Khloé Kardashian, with braided hair, are also seen clapping and smiling. The scoreboard displays 'A CELEB 32', 'MY MOM/DAD 25', 'MY SPOUSE/MATE 9', 'THE FUZZ 6', and 'MY IN-LAWS 5'. The Host announces, "That was a good answer. I like that one. Number six!" followed by another buzzer and an audience shout of "My ex!" He then declares, "Well, folks, it's still anybody's game right now. We'll be right back. Don't go away!" as vibrant blue and orange stage lighting illuminates the circular backdrops. The segment concludes with the Host walking toward the KARDASHIAN team, placing a hand on Khloé’s podium as she smiles, while a male voiceover promotes the show, saying, "Never seen this show before... They're discussing the answer. No cheating over there, no discussing..." amidst continued game show music and applause.

The camera then cuts to a wide shot of the vibrant blue and orange 'Celebrity Family Feud' stage, revealing circular backdrops labeled 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN', and a large, clapping audience. The Host moves dynamically, engaging the teams with animated gestures, explaining that "Point values are triple. This is the big one, someone could win it," and humorously adding, "Never seen this show before." He stands between the team captains—Kris Jenner for KARDASHIAN and a woman with long blonde hair for WEST—as he reads the question from a blue card: "Name an animal with spots." A buzzer sounds, and Kanye West quickly responds, "Giraffe," which the Host confirms with an enthusiastic "Giraffe!" followed by a ding and cheers. Kris Jenner then offers "Dalmatian," clarifying "A Dalmatian" when the Host asks "Huh?", leading to the Host's excited declaration of "Dalmatian!" The screen displays 'GIRAFFE' with 4 points and 'DALMATIAN/DOG' with 17 points. The Host reacts with excitement, turning to the KARDASHIAN team, who are visibly celebrating their correct answer amidst loud cheers and celebratory music. segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the Host, a bald man in a gray suit, holding a blue card and smiling as he initiates the game by asking, "Name an animal with spots." He then prompts, "What about a leopard?" leading to an enthusiastic "Leopard!" from him, met with immediate cheers and applause from the audience. The Host announces, "One answer left," and observes, "They're discussing the answer." A female voice from the KARDASHIAN team, where Khloé Kardashian (braided hair, black long-sleeve) and Kris Jenner (black outfit, cross necklace) are reacting excitedly, interjects, "No cheating over there, no discussing, no discussing, no cheating." Another female voice exclaims, "Oh!" The Host declares, "Oh, that's an automatic disqualification. I guess we, uh, win this," followed by a repeat of "disqualification." A female voice comments, "I think someone's upset that they're losing." The Host then places his hand on Khloé’s podium, prompting laughter and applause, before announcing, "The Kardashians win!" Kris Jenner reacts with a delighted "Oh!" The Host continues, "If it's not there, you're still alive, you have no strikes," and then directly addresses Kris, "Name an animal with spots, Chris." Kris Jenner confidently responds, "A cheetah," which is met with audience applause. The Host exclaims, "This is for the win! A cheetah!" Immediately, celebratory music erupts, accompanied by loud cheers, applause, and the sound of confetti cannons. The large screen displays scores: 'LEOPARD 61', 'DALMATIAN/DOG 17', 'GIRAFFE 4', with a total of '246'. On the WEST team, Kanye West (black zip-up) stands confidently, while Kim Kardashian (long silver-blonde hair, black sleeveless top) laughs and raises her arms in celebration, sharing a joyful moment with Kanye. Kourtney Kardashian (curly dark hair, green sleeveless top) is also seen smiling and adjusting her hair. The Host shakes hands with Kanye and then Kim. segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the Host, a bald man in a gray suit and patterned tie, energetically welcoming viewers back to 'Celebrity Family Feud' and the Kardashian family, as the audience erupts in applause and cheers. He stands center stage between Kendall Jenner and Khloé Kardashian, both in black ensembles, under dynamic blue and orange lighting with the show's circular logo. The Host gestures animatedly, holding a blue card, before announcing, 'And now it's time to play! Fast Money!' to further audience excitement. The camera pans out to reveal the full set, showing the KARDASHIAN and WEST team podiums, with team members seated and clapping. The Host moves toward the WEST team, engaging with Kim Kardashian, who has long silver-blonde hair and wears a black sleeveless top, and Kanye West, in a black zip-up jacket, both smiling. He then turns to the KARDASHIAN team, placing a hand on Khloé’s podium as she smiles. The Host continues to interact with the teams, moving between them with energy, while the audience applauds. He then approaches Kim Kardashian again, who laughs and raises her arms in excitement. The Host announces, 'For the first time in the history of Family Feud, we have an announcement, Khloé.' Khloé, with braided hair, then speaks, explaining that she and Kendall are 'deciding to let them play Fast Money because it's going to the same charity,' referring to Kim and Kanye, who were 'dying to do this.' Kendall smiles broadly and waves playfully during this announcement. The Host then declares, 'So Kanye West and Kim West are gonna play Fast Money!' as Kim walks away from her podium, interacting with the Host. Close-ups show Khloé gesturing expressively and Kim, who, with a slightly nervous but excited tone, states, 'I am so nervous. I've practiced this in my bedroom every single night.' The Host, now alone center stage, maintains a lively and humorous tone, gesturing toward the audience and teams, who remain engaged throughout the modern, illuminated stage design.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a close-up of Kim Kardashian, who has long silver-blonde hair and is wearing a black sleeveless top, standing beside the Host, a bald man with a mustache in a gray suit and patterned tie. Kim speaks with a clear voice, expressing her hope not to "do awful because the charity needs it." They are on a brightly lit game show stage with dynamic blue and orange lighting and a circular backdrop featuring illuminated dots. The Host holds a blue card with 'Celebrity Family Feud' branding and gestures animatedly as he speaks to Kim, stating, "It's hard to practice for this game." Kim responds, "Yes, I know," before the Host humorously adds that he'll ask "some stuff that's way more ridiculous" than what she's practiced for, noting, "It's hard to practice for for ignorance." Kim then clarifies, "Children's Hospital Los Angeles, this is for you," prompting an enthusiastic "Yay!" from the audience. The camera cuts to a wide shot revealing the full stage setup: two teams, 'KARDASHIAN' and 'WEST', each with four members standing behind podiums. The KARDASHIAN team includes Kris Jenner, Khloé Kardashian, Kendall Jenner, and a woman with short brown hair, while the WEST team features Kanye West, Kim Kardashian, Kourtney Kardashian, and a woman with long blonde hair. The Host moves between the teams, engaging them with energy, placing his hand on Kim’s podium and then gesturing toward the audience. He addresses Kim, announcing, "This is for my man Yeezy," referring to Kanye West, and explains the game: "five questions in 20 seconds," where she can "just say pass." He adds that she and Kanye need to "come up with 200 points" and asks her to state what she's playing for. Kim reacts with excitement, clapping and raising her arms, and clearly states, "$25,000 for the Children's Hospital Los Angeles," which is met with loud cheering and applause from the audience, accompanied by a game show sound effect. The Host exclaims, "Yeah!" and asks, "Alright, you ready?" to which Kim enthusiastically replies, "Yes!" The camera returns to close-ups of Kim and the Host as he instructs, "20 seconds on the clock, please." A blue circular graphic displaying '20' appears on screen, likely indicating time, as a game show "ding" and "whoosh" sound are heard. Kim acknowledges with "Okay," and the Host begins a new question, "On a scale of 1 to 10..." The atmosphere remains lively, with the audience visible in the background, clapping and reacting to the interaction, and the vibrant stage design featuring a central platform with the 'Celebrity Family Feud' logo, surrounded by LED lights and spotlights.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a close-up of Kim Kardashian, a woman with long silver-blonde hair and a black sleeveless top, wearing a blue badge displaying the number '20'. The Host, a bald man in a gray suit, stands beside her, holding a 'Celebrity Family Feud' card. The Host energetically asks, "How sexy are you compared to the people you work with?", to which Kim confidently responds, "Ten." The Host reacts with a playful "Name a part... oh yeah, okay, start," as fast-paced game show sounds and laughter erupt, with Kim visually reacting with smiles and expressive hand movements, clapping and raising her arms in excitement. As the number on her badge counts down, Kim playfully asks, "Do I get those seconds back?", but the Host, with a humorous tone, explains they need to "start over" because he was "stunned at the question." Kim acknowledges with "Okay, okay, okay." After a brief reset and a game show sound, the Host confirms, "20 seconds on the clock. You ready?", and Kim responds with a ready "Yes." The Host then repeats the question, "On a scale of 1 to 10, how sexy are you compared to the people you work with?", and Kim again quickly answers, "Ten." The game continues with the Host rapidly firing questions like "Name a part of the body you're always banging into things?" and Kim swiftly answering "Your butt." She continues to provide quick answers to subsequent questions, including "Pie" for "slice of what?", "Running in the wheel" for a hamster's activity, and "Milk" for a milkshake ingredient. The segment concludes with a "Bam!" sound effect, as Kim raises her arm triumphantly and the Host looks on, signaling a successful round amidst the vibrant, blue-lit game show atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The 'Celebrity Family Feud' stage bursts to life with vibrant blue and orange lighting, showcasing the 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN' team podiums, as the audience erupts in loud cheers and applause. The Host, a bald man with a mustache in a gray suit, stands center stage with Kim Kardashian, who has long silver-blonde hair and wears a black sleeveless top. He energetically exclaims "Bam! Bam!" and "Alright!" to the enthusiastic crowd, to which Kim responds with a clear "I did!" The Host then asks, "On a scale of one to ten, how sexy are you compared to the people you work with? You said..." A buzzer sounds, and he humorously declares, "I'm a ten. I've never said I was a ten. Ever," drawing widespread laughter from the audience. A distinct "Survey said!" sound effect and a "ding" lead into his next question: "Name a part of the body you're always bringing into things. You said..." Another buzzer sounds, and the Host reveals the answer: "Your butt," prompting even louder laughter and applause from the audience. The scoreboard visually updates, first displaying 'TEN' with a score of 10, then adding 'BUTT' with a score of 0, totaling 10. The Host laughs heartily, placing a hand on Kim’s shoulder as she reacts with amusement. He then turns and walks toward the KARDASHIAN team, where Kris Jenner smiles and claps, Khloé Kardashian looks down as the Host places a hand on her podium, and Kendall Jenner waves playfully. Maintaining his high-energy, comedic tone, the Host asks Kim, "Am I grinning that hard?" Kim, with a clear, conversational voice, replies, "No, I've I've really like knocked things over with my butt before. So, this is really true for me," eliciting more laughter before the Host playfully says "Bam!" and "Survey said!" as the segment concludes with continued audience engagement and a lively game show jingle.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a game show buzzer and the audience exclaiming "Oh!" and "What?!", followed by a female voice, possibly Kim Kardashian, echoing "What?!". The Host, a bald man with a mustache in a gray suit, stands center stage with Kim Kardashian, who has long silver-blonde hair and wears a black sleeveless top. He reassures, "It's, it's all right," then animatedly asks, "Here we go, fill in the blank, slice of what?" as he holds a blue 'Celebrity Family Feud' card. After a buzzer sound, he announces "Pie!" and confirms "Survey said!" with a ding, leading to a scoreboard update where 'PIE' jumps to 33. The Host continues, "Name something a pet hamster spends a lot of time doing, you said..." followed by another buzzer and his declaration, "Running on a wheel!" The scoreboard updates 'RUNNING IN WHEEL' to 55 after a "Survey said!" and ding. He then asks, "Name something you need to make a milkshake, you said..." and after a buzzer, states "Milk!" The scoreboard shows 'MILK' at 49, bringing the total to 147, as the Host exclaims "Wow!" Upbeat game show music swells, accompanied by loud audience cheers and the Host shouting, "Here come the points!" Kim reacts with surprise and excitement, her hands raised, then smiles and gestures playfully. A wide shot reveals the full set with blue and orange lighting, circular backdrops labeled 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN', and the clapping audience. The Host walks toward the WEST team, where Kim raises her arms in celebration, Kourtney Kardashian (curly dark hair, green top) laughs, and Kanye West (black zip-up jacket) smiles. A female voice, possibly Kourtney or Khloé, is heard saying "Good job, Kim!" The Host then moves to the KARDASHIAN team, placing a hand on Khloé Kardashian’s (braided hair, black long-sleeve top) podium as she smiles. Returning to center stage with Kanye, who laughs heartily, the Host announces, "Hey, don't go away! We'll be right back! Find out if Kanye can win $25,000 for his charity!" The energetic atmosphere is enhanced by dynamic spotlights and LED effects, with the audience remaining engaged, clapping and reacting. The Host continues, "Coming up, let's bring Kanye out, see if he can win this $25,000!" and then poses a question to Kanye, "On a scale of 1 to 10, how sexy are you compared to the people you work with? Your wife said 10. You said..."

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with the Host, a bald man in a gray suit and patterned tie, standing with his arm around Kanye West, who is wearing a black zip-up jacket and laughs heartily as the Host recounts a previous answer, stating "Ten," then "Then you said." The scene transitions as the Host energetically walks across the stage, gesturing with his hands, while upbeat game show music swells. The camera pans to reveal the full game show set, illuminated with dynamic blue and orange lighting, featuring circular backdrops labeled 'WEST' and 'KARDASHIAN', and a central platform with the show's logo. The Host's voice booms, "Welcome back Celebrity Family Feud! Let's bring Kanye out, see if he can win this $25,000. Let's go, Ye!" The Host then approaches Kanye again, shaking his hand and engaging in conversation, as Kanye smiles and claps. The camera cuts to Kim Kardashian, with long silver-blonde hair and a black sleeveless top, clapping and raising her arms in excitement, while the audience cheers loudly and game show music continues. The Host continues to interact with Kanye, who laughs and gestures, amidst ongoing audience cheers, before the Host declares, "All right, we in business." The scene shifts to a close-up of the score screen, displaying Kanye’s answers: 'TEN' (10), 'BUTT' (0), 'PIE' (33), 'RUNNING IN WHEEL' (55), 'MILK' (49), with a total of 147. The Host, standing side by side with Kanye, smiles as he comments, "Wifey did pretty good, couple of stunning answers, but she did good. Your girl got 147 points," prompting cheers and applause from the audience. As stage lights flash and the audience applauds, the Host informs Kanye, "Kanye, we need 53. We need 53 for the money." The Host continues to speak, explaining the rules: "This is gonna be good. All right, this is how we gonna do it. I'm gonna ask you the same five questions. You cannot duplicate the answers. If you do, you're gonna hear this sound." A distinct buzzer sound effect plays, after which the Host clarifies, "I'm gonna say try again, you give me another answer. Gonna be a little bit tougher this time, so we're gonna give you 25 seconds. You ready?" Kanye West responds with a clear "Yeah." The Host concludes by stating, "All right, let's remind everybody of Kim's answers." A chime sound effect plays, followed by the Host's instruction, "25 seconds on the clock, please," and a final buzzer sound effect.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with Kim Kardashian, with long silver-blonde hair and a black sleeveless top, smiling and gesturing on stage under blue lighting, as the Host, Steve Harvey, speaks about a tied top answer with 32 points. Steve Harvey, a bald man with a mustache in a gray suit, then asks the audience to "Name a part of the body you always banging in the things," before stating "Your knee, survey said!" A distinct game show sound effect signals a wrong answer, immediately followed by an upbeat celebratory music track and enthusiastic audience cheering and clapping. Kanye West, in a black zip-up jacket, stands beside Steve Harvey, who places a hand on his shoulder. A scoreboard appears, displaying categories like 'TEN', 'BUTT', 'PIE', 'RUNNING IN WHEEL', and 'MILK', with a total of 168. Steve Harvey announces the correct answers, confirming "Leg and knee was the number one answer. Pie was the number one answer. Running on the wheel the number one answer. Milk was the number one answer," adding "They had all the number ones." He then announces '$25,000' in large, glowing blue text, stating it's "for Children's Hospital of Los Angeles," prompting Kim Kardashian to react with immense excitement, raising her arms and laughing. The camera pans to a wide shot of the stage, showing Steve Harvey walking toward the WEST team, which includes Kanye West, Kim Kardashian, Kourtney Kardashian (in a green sleeveless top), and others, as the audience continues to cheer loudly. Steve Harvey engages the team with animated gestures, and the group celebrates with hugs and laughter. Kim Kardashian embraces Steve Harvey, while Kris Jenner (in a black outfit with a cross necklace) and other team members clap and smile. Steve Harvey continues to interact energetically with the joyful and celebratory group. The video concludes with a graphic of Steve Harvey raising his fist, accompanied by the continuing upbeat music and "SUBSCRIBE" repeated in bold yellow text on a blue background, encouraging viewers to subscribe.
